scripts.build:remote:release: npm run build:remote:wasm && vite build && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/remote/out && cp examples/remote/out/main.js examples/remote/out/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/remote/out/
scripts.build:all:release: npm run build:remote:release && npm run build:c:wasm && npm run build:nim:wasm && npm run build:haxe:wasm && make -C examples/c-simple wasm && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/c-lua/out && cp examples/c-lua/out/main.js examples/c-lua/out/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/c-lua/out/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/nim/out/wasm && cp examples/nim/out/wasm/main.js examples/nim/out/wasm/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/nim/out/wasm/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/haxe/out/wasm && cp examples/haxe/out/wasm/Main.js examples/haxe/out/wasm/Main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/haxe/out/wasm/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/c-simple/out && cp examples/c-simple/out/main.js examples/c-simple/out/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/c-simple/out/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/js && cp -r examples/js/* examples/www/dist/examples/js/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/lib && cp lib/librl.js lib/librl.wasm examples/www/dist/lib/
